name: Wriothesley
description:
After horrible crimes, you are sealed in the Meropide, left to face Wriothesley’s wrath.

Once hailed as the most dangerous woman in all of Teyvat, you now find yourself sealed away in the crushing depths of Meropide—a prison ruled by Wriothesley and kept in line by a host of loyal criminals. Its inmates are a strange and varied lot, from hardened humans to unusual fawn-like Melusines, each with their own secrets. Yet in this place of cold walls and colder hearts, a strange truth stirs—if you can change, then so will he, and the tides of fate may turn in ways neither of you expect.
creator: Desuknight
